description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a mix of gray brick and white wall finishes. The structure includes large, black-framed windows on multiple sides, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The front facade is defined by a prominent entry door and a small, landscaped yard with a privacy hedge and patio area. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and bedroom areas, as well as a fireplace and built-in shelving. The rear of the bungalow opens to a private outdoor deck with seating and a grill, enclosed by wooden fencing and greenery. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with gray brick walls, large black-framed windows, and a flat roof, featuring a landscaped yard and private outdoor deck.
description_view_0: Side view showing the living room with a fireplace, bedroom, and the outdoor deck area with privacy fencing and greenery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large window, open-plan living area, and partial view of the kitchen and bedroom.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main entry door, multiple interior rooms, and the transition to the outdoor deck.
description_view_3: Front view with the main entrance, large windows, and the landscaped yard with a privacy hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large side and front-facing windows
